mapper.select: SELECT id, source, frame, customer, time, number, total, actual, money, cost, account, people, logistics, file, data, more, examine, nucleus, cse, invoice, `check`, `user` FROM sell WHERE id = #{saleId}

SELECT id, source, frame, supplier, time, number, total, actual, money, cost, account, people, logistics, file, data, more, examine, nucleus, cse, invoice, `check`, `user` FROM buy WHERE id = #{purchaseId}

SELECT number FROM sor WHERE number IN
#{no}

SELECT s.frame AS organization, s.customer AS customer, s.time AS orderTime, s.number AS orderNo, s.total AS orderAmount, s.actual AS actualAmount, s.arrival AS arrivalDate, s.people AS relatedPerson, CASE s.examine WHEN 0 THEN '未审核' WHEN 1 THEN '已审核' END AS auditStatus, CASE s.state WHEN 0 THEN '未出库' WHEN 1 THEN '部分出库' WHEN 2 THEN '已出库' WHEN 3 THEN '关闭' END AS deliveryStatus, s.user AS creator, s.data AS remarks FROM sor s WHERE s.number IN
#{no}

SELECT s.customer AS customer, DATE_FORMAT(s.time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS orderDate, s.number AS orderNo, s.total AS totalOrderAmount, s.actual AS totalActualAmount, s.people AS relatedPerson, DATE_FORMAT(s.arrival, '%Y-%m-%d') AS arrivalDate, s.logistics AS logisticsInfo, s.data AS orderRemarks FROM sor s WHERE s.number IN
#{no}

SELECT i.goods AS productName, '' AS specification, -- 若有规格字段可关联商品表查询 i.attr AS auxiliaryAttr, i.unit AS unit, i.warehouse AS warehouse, i.price AS unitPrice, i.nums AS quantity, i.handle AS deliveredQuantity, i.discount AS discountRate, i.dsc AS discountAmount, i.total AS amount, i.data AS itemRemarks, s.number AS orderNo -- 关联主表获取单据编号 FROM sor_info i LEFT JOIN sor s ON i.pid = s.id WHERE s.number IN
#{no}
